title: lysimachia foenum-graecum
intro: Lysimachia foenum-graecum, also known as Fo-ti or Chinese valerian, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Primulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-aging properties. The health benefits of Fo-ti include improving cognitive function, boosting the immune system, and promoting longevity, as well as potentially reducing the risk of age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Fo-ti can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
